name: Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra 5G
description: Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra with 200MP camera, Snapdragon 8 Gen 2, 5000mAh battery, and built-in S Pen. Experience the pinnacle of Android smartphone technology with stunning display and pro-grade photography capabilities.

name: OnePlus 11R 5G Smartphone
description: Powered by Snapdragon 8+ Gen 1, featuring a 6.7-inch 120Hz AMOLED display, 100W SUPERVOOC fast charging, and triple camera system with 50MP main sensor. Ultimate performance meets elegant design.

name: Apple iPhone 15 Pro Titanium
description: Apple iPhone 15 Pro with Aerospace-grade titanium design, A17 Pro chip, customizable Action button, and 48MP main camera system.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with Auto NC Optimizer, 30-hour battery life, multipoint connection, and crystal-clear hands-free calling. Premium audio with LDAC support for high-resolution wireless audio.

name: Apple MacBook Air M2
description: Supercharged by the next-generation M2 chip, MacBook Air has a strikingly thin design, MagSafe charging, and up to 18 hours of battery life. The 13.6-inch Liquid Retina display features over 500 nits of brightness.

name: Boat Airdopes 141 TWS Earbuds
description: True Wireless Stereo earbuds with 42 hours total playback, BEAST Mode for gaming with low latency, IPX4 water resistance, and Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity. Immersive audio experience at an unbeatable price.

name: Levi's 511 Slim Fit Jeans
description: Classic slim fit jeans crafted from premium stretch denim for comfort and style. Features a modern slim cut from hip to ankle, five-pocket styling, and Levi's signature quality. Available in multiple washes.

name: Allen Solly Formal Shirt
description: Premium cotton formal shirt with a regular fit, perfect for office and business occasions. Features a classic collar, full sleeves with cuffs, and a comfortable breathable fabric that stays fresh all day.

name: Fabindia Kurta Pyjama Set
description: Handcrafted ethnic wear set featuring a classic kurta with intricate embroidery paired with comfortable pyjama. Made from pure cotton for breathability and comfort. Perfect for festive occasions and casual outings.

name: Nike Air Max 270 Running Shoes
description: Inspired by two of Nike's greatest Air innovations, the Air Max 270 features a Max Air 270 heel unit with bold, expressive design. Engineered mesh upper for breathability with foam midsole for lightweight cushioning.

name: Zara Floral Maxi Dress
description: Elegant floral print maxi dress with a flowy silhouette, adjustable straps, and a flattering fit. Made from lightweight, breathable fabric perfect for summer evenings and special occasions.

name: Atomic Habits by James Clear
description: The #1 New York Times bestseller. James Clear's practical strategies show you exactly how to form good habits, break bad ones, and master the tiny behaviours that lead to remarkable results. A must-read for anyone serious about self-improvement.

name: Rich Dad Poor Dad by Robert Kiyosaki
description: The #1 Personal Finance book of all time teaches you what the rich teach their kids about money—that the poor and middle class do not. A timeless guide to financial independence and building wealth through investing and entrepreneurship.

name: The Alchemist by Paulo Coelho
description: A magical story about Santiago, an Andalusian shepherd boy who travels from his homeland in Spain to the Egyptian desert in search of treasure. A philosophical novel about following your dreams and listening to your heart.

name: Think and Grow Rich by Napoleon Hill
description: After studying over 500 self-made millionaires, Napoleon Hill wrote this timeless classic on the principles of success. Distilled wisdom on mindset, planning, and persistent action to achieve your financial and personal goals.

name: Deep Work by Cal Newport
description: Rules for Focused Success in a Distracted World. Deep work is the ability to focus without distraction on a cognitively demanding task. Cal Newport shows that this skill is increasingly rare and increasingly valuable in our economy.

name: Amazon Basics Non-Stick Cookware Set
description: 5-piece non-stick cookware set including frying pan, saucepan, and kadai. Premium hard-anodized body with scratch-resistant non-stick coating, ergonomic soft-touch handles, and compatible with all cooktops including induction.

name: Mi 55 inch 4K Ultra HD Smart TV
description: 55-inch 4K UHD display with Dolby Vision and Dolby Atmos support, PatchWall 4 with IMDb integration, 30W speakers, and Android TV with Google Assistant. Transform your home entertainment experience.

name: Prestige IRIS 750W Mixer Grinder
description: 750W powerful motor with 3 stainless steel jars (1.5L liquidizing, 1L dry grinding, 0.4L chutney). Features speed control, turbo function, and 100% copper motor for long lasting performance. 5-year warranty.

name: Philips HL7756 Juicer Mixer Grinder
description: 1000W motor with ProBlend 6 3D technology for smooth blending. Includes juicer attachment with high juice extraction, 3 multipurpose jars, and a unique jar design that ensures superior performance even at lower speeds.

name: Dyson V8 Absolute Cordless Vacuum
description: Powerful cordless vacuum cleaner with 40 minutes run time, motorized cleaner head for deep cleaning carpets, and direct drive motor bar. Transforms to handheld in one click. Hygienic bin emptying mechanism.

name: Godrej Refrigerator 236L Frost Free
description: 236L frost-free double door refrigerator with 5-star energy rating, intelligent inverter technology, and nanoShield anti-bacterial technology. Features adjustable glass shelves, large vegetable crisper, and 10-year compressor warranty.

name: LEGO Star Wars Millennium Falcon
description: Millennium Falcon LEGO brick build with 7 iconic characters, cockpit, detail interior, and action play launchers.

name: Hot Wheels Monster Truck Set
description: Pack of 4 Hot Wheels Monster Trucks with giant wheels, die-cast metal bodies, and cool designs for crashing action.

name: Teddy Bear Premium Soft Toy
description: Super soft and huggable premium brown teddy bear made with child-safe material. Height: 3 feet.

name: Organic Green Tea Leaves Darjeeling
description: 100% natural, whole-leaf green tea leaves loaded with antioxidants. Sourced from organic Darjeeling gardens.

name: ON Gold Standard 100% Whey Protein 2kg
description: Gold Standard 100% Whey Protein with 24g protein per serving to support muscle building. Chocolate Flavor.

name: Dabur Chyawanprash 1kg
description: Classic Ayurvedic formulation with goodness of Amla, Giloy, and 40+ herbs to boost immunity and general health.

name: Car Mobile Holder Mount
description: One-touch dashboard mount phone holder for car with adjustable telescopic arm and super sticky gel pad.

name: Premium Car Perfume Gel (Ocean Spray)
description: Gel-based car air freshener with clean, soothing ocean scent. Lasts up to 60 days. Spill-proof design.

name: Microfiber Car Cleaning Cloths (4-Pack)
description: Thick, highly absorbent microfiber cloths for car washing, detailing, lint-free polishing, and dusting.

name: Vega Half Face Helmet (L, Black)
description: ISI-approved lightweight half-face helmet with scratch-resistant clear visor and quick release chin strap.

name: Motorcycle Phone Holder with Fast USB Charger
description: Heavy-duty aluminum bike phone holder with built-in 5V/2.5A USB port to charge phone while riding.

name: Riding Gloves Full Finger (M/L/XL)
description: Breathable protective gloves with hard knuckle protection, anti-slip palms, and touch-screen compatible tips.

name: Cosco Challenger Football Size 5
description: Official size and weight football with durable 32-panel design for perfect flight and consistent performance. Features high-quality synthetic leather outer casing with latex bladder for superior air retention and shape retention.

name: Yonex Arcsaber 11 Badminton Racket
description: Professional grade badminton racket with Arc Power Control System for enhanced shuttle holding time on string bed. Ultra-slim shaft for improved aerodynamics. Isometric head shape increases sweet spot for maximum power.

name: Decathlon Essential Yoga Mat
description: 6mm thick yoga mat with anti-slip surface, ideal for dynamic yoga and floor exercises. Made from NBR foam for excellent cushioning and joint protection. Lightweight and easy to carry with included carry strap.

name: Protoner 20kg Adjustable Dumbbell Set
description: 20kg professional weight plates with two chrome steel dumbbell rods. Anti-rust cast iron weight plates with rubber coating for floor protection. Perfect for home gym workouts including bicep curls, shoulder press, and lunges.

name: Nivia Storm Football Shoes
description: Lightweight football shoes with synthetic upper for durability and comfort. Features non-marking TPR outsole with multi-stud configuration for superior grip on grass and turf surfaces. Cushioned insole for all-day comfort.

name: Lakme Eyeconic Kajal
description: Intense black kajal with a smooth, creamy formula for effortless application. Long-lasting, smudge-proof formula that stays put for up to 16 hours. Enriched with almond oil to condition the delicate eye area.

name: The Body Shop Vitamin E Moisturizer
description: Intensely moisturizing cream with Vitamin E and wheat germ oil for 24-hour deep hydration. Suitable for dry to normal skin, this cult-classic formula visibly reduces the appearance of fine lines and leaves skin feeling soft and supple.

name: L'Oreal Paris Revitalift Serum
description: Advanced anti-ageing face serum with 1.5% Pure Hyaluronic Acid and Vitamin C. Visibly reduces wrinkles and plumps skin for a youthful, radiant glow. Dermatologist tested, suitable for all skin types including sensitive skin.

name: Mamaearth Ubtan Face Wash
description: Natural face wash with turmeric and saffron that gently cleanses while brightening skin tone. Free from sulfates, parabens, and artificial fragrances. Dermatologically tested formula suitable for all skin types for a naturally glowing complexion.

name: Ergonomic Mesh Office Chair
description: High-back office desk chair with adjustable lumbar support, 3D armrests, breathable mesh, and smooth nylon casters.

name: Foldable Wooden Study Table
description: Space-saving wooden writing table desk for computer, laptop, study, and home office. No assembly required.

name: Solid Wood Coffee Table
description: Elegant minimalist sheesham wood coffee table for living room with storage shelf.
